name: Bug report

title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened

Describe the failure and what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

```bash
pnpm verdictci run --config path/to/verdictci.yaml --output .tmp/verdictci-result.json
```

## Environment

- VerdictCI version or commit:
- Node.js version:
- pnpm version:
- Operating system:
- GitHub Actions runner, if relevant:

## Result artifact

Attach or summarize the relevant `verdictci-result.json` fields. Do not include secrets, private prompts, raw model outputs, customer data, or provider traces.

## Additional context

Add any logs or screenshots that help explain the issue.
